10499096.title: Voice of a Serial Killer
10499096.description: Jennifer Pan witnessed the murder of her mother and the attempted murder of her father. But when he wakes from a coma, her father has a very different story to tell.

10522608.title: Voice of a Serial Killer
10522608.description: How do the FBI find a killer with no victim or geographic profile and who covers his trail with counter forensics. And if they can find him, how would they prove responsibility?

10589400.title: Voice of a Serial Killer
10589400.description: A fraternal bond can be unbreakable, with secrets and codes based on favourite films and silly plans. What happens when a body is found and the codes are used for murder?

10612716.title: Voice of a Serial Killer
10612716.description: When a criminal on probation embarks on a killing spree of ex-lovers, police try to get ahead of the man who will later insist that he is a victim and that society is to blame.
